conversions.name: Belt-Fed Conversion

rules: Magazine value becomes that of the belt being used.
Reload becomes 15.

variantOption.name: Belt-Fed Conversion with Standard Magazine Compatibility
rules: Magazine value becomes that of the belt being used.
Reload becomes 15.
Weapon may still use standard magazines.

conversions.rulesSummary: Belt-feed conversion; reload becomes 15; optional variant retains standard magazine use.

conversions.name: Collapsible/Folding Stock

rules: Allows HW weapons to be concealed as TH weapons.
Allows TH weapons to be concealed as OH weapons.
Allows OH weapons to be concealed as DW weapons.
Gives DW weapons an extra +10 to Camouflage and Concealing.

conversions.rulesSummary: Improves concealment categories and grants a Camouflage/Concealing bonus for DW weapons.

conversions.name: Flared Magwell

rules: Reduces base Reload by 1.

conversions.notes: Cannot be used with Single Loading weapons.
conversions.rulesSummary: Reload -1; forbidden on Single Loading weapons.

conversions.name: Heavy Stock

rules: Reduces the meters a player can move before an Aim Action is lost by 2 meters.
Doubles the meters an enemy must move before the user loses Aim Action benefits.

conversions.rulesSummary: Adjusts Aim Action loss thresholds for self/enemy movement.

rules: Applies a +5 To Hit modifier.

conversions.name: Kinetic Bolt Modification

rules: Adds the Kinetic Special Rule.
Does not gain the usual +1D10 Damage against targets without Energy Shields.
Instead gains +1D10 Damage against Vehicles.
Allows the weapon to deal normal Damage to Vehicles that do not have the Heavy Plating Special Rule.

conversions.rulesSummary: Adds Kinetic; shifts bonus damage interaction to Vehicles; cost is weapon cost ×5.

conversions.name: Light Stock
conversions.description: Fictional aim/movement and weight rule modification.

rules: Character may move up to their Full Action and still keep Aim Action active.
Reduces the meters an enemy must move before the user loses Aim Action benefits by 2 meters, minimum 1.
Reduces weapon weight by 0.1 kg if the weapon already had a stock.
Adds 0.2 kg if the weapon did not have a stock.

conversions.notes: Fictional aim/movement and weight rule only.
conversions.rulesSummary: Adjusts Aim Action movement thresholds and applies calculated weight adjustments.

conversions.name: Lightweight Weaponry Kit

rules: Halves weapon weight.
Halves weapon Breakpoints.

conversions.rulesSummary: Weapon weight and Breakpoints are halved.

conversions.name: Micro Stock

rules: Reduces weapon weight by 15%, figured before any other modifications that modify weapon weight.
Allows HW weapons to be concealed as TH weapons.
Allows TH weapons to be concealed as OH weapons.
Allows OH weapons to be concealed as DW weapons.
Gives DW weapons an extra +10 to Camouflage and Concealing.
Character may move up to their Full Action and still keep Aim Action active.
Applies a -10 To Hit modifier.

conversions.notes: Bullet Loop cannot be used with Micro Stock.
conversions.rulesSummary: Weight -15% (pre-mod), concealment improvements, Aim retention, -10 To Hit; incompatible with Bullet Loop.

conversions.name: Pistol Stock Adapter
conversions.description: Fictional adapter enabling stock installation options.

rules: Allows installation of Heavy Stock or Light Stock on a Pistol.
Does not include a stock.
Causes DW weapons to be concealed as OH weapons.
Causes OH weapons to be concealed as TH weapons.

conversions.rulesSummary: Enables Heavy/Light Stock on pistols; adjusts concealment category.

conversions.name: Plasma Adapter Modification

rules: Adds the Cauterize Special Rule.

conversions.notes: Cannot be used with Kinetic Bolt Modification.
conversions.rulesSummary: Adds Cauterize; cost is weapon cost ×5; incompatible with Kinetic Bolt Modification.

conversions.name: Shotgun Automatic Conversion

rules: Converts Pump Action rate of fire to Auto (X).
X equals original Pump Action value multiplied by 2, then +1.
Example: Pump Action (2) becomes Auto (5).
Weapon gains general Rifle Reload Time instead of Pump Action reload timing.
Replaces shotgun ammo feed with a Magazine of the same base ammunition count.

conversions.rulesSummary: Pump Action -> Auto(X) conversion; X=(pump×2)+1; switches to rifle reload timing; magazine feed of base count.

conversions.name: Weapon Camouflage
conversions.description: Fictional camouflage rule for hiding a weapon.

rules: Gives +20 Camouflage when attempting to hide the weapon.
Can be traded in without cost between missions.
When used alongside a user wearing a Ghillie Suit, Heavy and Two-Handed weapons are hidden alongside them.

conversions.notes: Does not stack with Weapon Ghillie Cover bonuses.
conversions.rulesSummary: +20 Camouflage for hiding weapon; tradeable between missions; does not stack with Weapon Ghillie Cover.

conversions.name: Weapon Ghillie Cover
conversions.description: Fictional camouflage cover for a weapon.

rules: Gives +20 Camouflage for hiding the weapon in proper camouflage/background.
Opponent trying to spot it has -20 penalty in proper camouflage/background.

conversions.notes: Does not stack with Weapon Camouflage bonuses.
conversions.rulesSummary: +20 Camouflage in proper background; opponent -20 to spot in proper background; does not stack with Weapon Camouflage.
